meta.title: Igor · Full-stack developer
meta.description: Igor (kingegoat) — full-stack developer. Landing pages, Telegram bots, FastAPI web services. Open source on GitHub.

hero.sub: I build landing pages, Telegram bots and FastAPI web services. Code is open source on GitHub.

about.title: Who I am
about.p1: Full-stack developer. I build landing pages, Telegram bots and web services end-to-end — from idea and design to deployment.
about.p2: I work solo, so communication is direct, deadlines are fixed, and all the code is mine — no subcontractors. Every production repo lives on GitHub — feel free to read, run, or fork.

stack.title: Stack
stack.lead: Only what I actually ship in production.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: Code is open — inspect it, deploy it, fork it.

1.title: devcraft-studio
1.text: Marketing site + FastAPI backend + Telegram bot on aiogram 3. One monorepo: Docker, tests, migrations.

2.title: landing-template
2.text: Universal landing page starter. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, mobile-first, dark/light themes, multi-language. Zero build.

1.title: Landing pages
1.text: Responsive layout, clean code, instant load. Mobile-first, cross-browser, SEO-ready.

2.title: Telegram bots
2.text: From a simple FAQ bot to a full system with FSM, payments, CRM and admin panel. aiogram 3, webhooks.

3.title: Web services & APIs
3.text: FastAPI backend with REST, auth, PostgreSQL. Docker deploy, docs out of the box.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Telegram is the fastest. I usually reply within a couple of hours during business time.

footer.built: Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS — zero build step
